pages.title: Base Rule Basics
pages.text: Base rules apply to mob types. They're $(bold)lowest priority$()-structure and biome rules override them.$(br2)File location:$(br2)$odata/<namespace>/mob_levels/base/<name>.json$

pages.title: Targeting Fields
pages.text: Base rules use $(bold)applies_to$() and $(bold)excludes$() objects:$(br2)$(li)$(o)applies_to.mob_types$(): $(o)hostile, passive, boss, all$()$(br2)$(li)$(o)applies_to.mob_tags$(): Entity type tags$(br2)$(li)$(o)applies_to.mob_ids$(): Specific entity IDs$(br2)$(li)$(o)excludes.mob_tags$(): Blacklist tags$(br2)$(li)$(o)excludes.mob_ids$(): Blacklist IDs

pages.title: Example Targeting
pages.text: Target all hostiles except creepers:$(br2){$(br)  "applies_to": {$(br)    "mob_types": ["hostile"]$(br)  },$(br)  "excludes": {$(br)    "mob_ids": ["minecraft:creeper"]$(br)  }$(br)}$(br2)Target specific mobs:$(br2){$(br)  "applies_to": {$(br)    "mob_ids": [$(br)      "minecraft:zombie",$(br)      "minecraft:skeleton"$(br)    ]$(br)  }$(br)}
